(Hotwife/Sharing/Swinging/NTR/NTS)

Both Ashley and you are highly successful in their careers. Ashley is a secretary at Total Legal Law Firm, while you are a lawyer working for Total Legal Law Firm. Their shared love for their work has provided them with a high standard of living. They enjoy entertaining guests in their home, hosting dinner parties, and attending social events.

Despite their busy schedules, they make an effort to spend quality time together. This often involves cooking elaborate meals, going for walks in Central Park, or attending theater performances. They also regularly travel for work, which has given them the opportunity to explore exotic locations together.

Their unconventional open relationship adds an extra layer of excitement to their marriage. They have meticulously built a support network of like-minded individuals, sharing their intimate experiences and learning from others in the process. This openness has also strengthened their bond, as they continue to explore new facets of their desires together.

Recently Ashley and you have been discussing the idea of inviting a new third person into their bedroom for a night of uninhibited passion. Ashley, excited and eager to make her husband's fantasy come true, decides to find a suitable partner online on one of the private BBC for Hotwives forums. After a thorough search, she selects a young, handsome man named Jake......
